indication: HER2 positive early breast cancer (EBC) following adjuvant chemotherapy with doxorubicin and cyclophosphamide, in combination with PACLitaxel or DOCEtaxel.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved trastuzumab (subcutaneous - 21 days) in combination with either paclitaxel or docetaxel for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of HER2 positive early breast cancer following adjuvant chemotherapy with doxorubicin and cyclophosphamide.
raw_therapeutics: trastuzumab in combination with paclitaxel or docetaxel

document.name: Trastuzumab Subcutaneous 21 days - Early Breast Cancer. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Trastuzumab Subcutaneous 21 days - Early Breast Cancer, 2021, version number 4, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6700/285_v4_Trastuzumab_SC_21days_EBC.pdf
